---
name: New Module
about: Propose a new curriculum module
title: '[MODULE] Track Name — Module Title'
labels: 'new-module'
---

## Track
Which track does this belong to? (00-foundations / 01-offensive / etc.)

## Module title
Short descriptive name.

## Learning objective
One sentence: what will the learner be able to do after completing this?

## OSS tools used
List only open source tools.

## Estimated time
How long should this take a learner?

## Your background
Optional: brief note on your experience with this topic.
